messages.content:
_Open-source Non Tool-using Video MLLMs_
  
这个标题合适吗

大体能看懂，但不太自然，主要问题是：

1) **“Non Tool-using”** 这种写法不常见，读起来有点别扭  
2) **“Video MLLMs”** 可以，但如果面向更广受众，通常会写成 **Video Multimodal LLMs** 或 **Video MLLMs**（二者选一即可）  
3) “Open-source”作定语没问题，但更常见的搭配是 **Open-source …** 或 **Open Source …**（看你是否统一标题风格）

更自然的替代标题（按语气/强调点给几种）：

- **Open-Source Video MLLMs Without Tool Use**（表达最接近你原意）
- **Open-Source Tool-Free Video MLLMs**（更短更标题化，推荐）
- **Open-Source Video Multimodal LLMs (Tool-Free)**（更正式、清晰）
- **Tool-Free Open-Source Video MLLMs**（强调“tool-free”）

如果你的“Non Tool-using”指的是**推理时不调用外部工具/不依赖检索、OCR、ASR、检测器等**，那么用 **Tool-Free** 或 **Without External Tools** 会更清楚。

你这标题是用于论文小节、博客还是PPT？我可以按场景给最合适的一个版本。

\begin{tabular}{lclcclcccl}
\hline
&
  \multicolumn{1}{c|}{} &
  \multicolumn{1}{c}{\textbf{Charades}} &
  \textbf{VideoMME} &
  \textbf{MLVU} &
  \multicolumn{1}{c}{\textbf{MMVU}} &
  \textbf{LVBench} &
  \textbf{LongVideoBench} &
  \textbf{VideoMMMU} &
  \multicolumn{1}{c}{\textbf{VRBench}} \\
\multirow{-2}{*}{\textbf{Methods}} &
  \multicolumn{1}{c|}{\multirow{-2}{*}{\textbf{Sizes}}} &
  \multicolumn{1}{c}{mIOU} &
  Avg &
  M-Avg &
  \multicolumn{1}{c}{Avg} &
  Avg &
  Avg &
  Overall &
  \multicolumn{1}{c}{M-Avg} \\ \hline
\multicolumn{10}{l}{\textit{Open-source Tool-free Video MLLMs}}                                                                                                      \\ \hline
Qwen2.5-VL~\cite{bai2025qwen25vl}     & \multicolumn{1}{c|}{7B} &  &                      &                      &  &                      &                      &                      &  \\
Qwen3-VL~\cite{bai2025qwen3vl}       & \multicolumn{1}{c|}{8B} &  & \multicolumn{1}{l}{} & \multicolumn{1}{l}{} &  & \multicolumn{1}{l}{} & \multicolumn{1}{l}{} & \multicolumn{1}{l}{} &  \\
LLaVA-Video~\cite{llava_video}    & \multicolumn{1}{c|}{7B} &  &                      &                      &  &                      &                      &                      &  \\
Video-R1~\cite{feng2025video_r1}       & \multicolumn{1}{c|}{7B} &  & \multicolumn{1}{l}{} & \multicolumn{1}{l}{} &  & \multicolumn{1}{l}{} & \multicolumn{1}{l}{} & \multicolumn{1}{l}{} &  \\ \hline
\multicolumn{10}{l}{\textit{Open-source Decoupled Tool-using Video MLLMs}}                                                                                           \\ \hline
VideoChat-R1.5~\cite{yan2025videochat_r1_5} & \multicolumn{1}{c|}{7B} &  &                      &                      &  &                      &                      &                      &  \\
LOVE-R1~\cite{fu2025love_r1}        & \multicolumn{1}{c|}{7B} &  &                      &                      &  &                      &                      &                      &  \\
Video-RTS~\cite{video-rts}      & \multicolumn{1}{c|}{7B} &  &                      &                      &  &                      &                      &                      &  \\ \hline
\multicolumn{10}{l}{\textit{Open-source Native Tool-using Video MLLMs}}                                                                                              \\ \hline
VITAL~\cite{zhang2025vital}          & \multicolumn{1}{c|}{7B} &  & \multicolumn{1}{l}{} & \multicolumn{1}{l}{} &  & \multicolumn{1}{l}{} & \multicolumn{1}{l}{} & \multicolumn{1}{l}{} &  \\
Video-Zoomer~\cite{ding2025videozoomer}   & \multicolumn{1}{c|}{7B} &  & \multicolumn{1}{l}{} & \multicolumn{1}{l}{} &  & \multicolumn{1}{l}{} & \multicolumn{1}{l}{} & \multicolumn{1}{l}{} &  \\
LongVT~\cite{longvt}         & \multicolumn{1}{c|}{7B} &  & \multicolumn{1}{l}{} & \multicolumn{1}{l}{} &  & \multicolumn{1}{l}{} & \multicolumn{1}{l}{} & \multicolumn{1}{l}{} &  \\
\rowcolor[HTML]{C1FFD6}
Ours &
  \multicolumn{1}{c|}{\cellcolor[HTML]{C1FFD6}7B} &
   &
  \multicolumn{1}{l}{\cellcolor[HTML]{C1FFD6}} &
  \multicolumn{1}{l}{\cellcolor[HTML]{C1FFD6}} &
   &
  \multicolumn{1}{l}{\cellcolor[HTML]{C1FFD6}} &
  \multicolumn{1}{l}{\cellcolor[HTML]{C1FFD6}} &
  \multicolumn{1}{l}{\cellcolor[HTML]{C1FFD6}} &
   \\ \hline
\end{tabular}
    }
  
去掉charades一列

把 **Charades**（以及它下面的 mIOU 子表头）这一整列删掉即可：需要同时改

1) `tabular` 的列格式：从 10 列变 9 列  
2) 顶部两行表头：去掉 Charades 的 multicolumn，以及第二行的 `mIOU`  
3) 三个分组行：`\multicolumn{10}{...}` 改成 `\multicolumn{9}{...}`  
4) 每一行数据：删掉 Sizes 后面的那个空单元格（原本属于 Charades）

下面是删完 Charades 后的版本（保持你原排版风格）：

```latex
\begin{tabular}{lclcclcccl}
\hline
&
  \multicolumn{1}{c|}{} &
  \textbf{VideoMME} &
  \textbf{MLVU} &
  \multicolumn{1}{c}{\textbf{MMVU}} &
  \textbf{LVBench} &
  \textbf{LongVideoBench} &
  \textbf{VideoMMMU} &
  \multicolumn{1}{c}{\textbf{VRBench}} \\
\multirow{-2}{*}{\textbf{Methods}} &
  \multicolumn{1}{c|}{\multirow{-2}{*}{\textbf{Sizes}}} &
  Avg &
  M-Avg &
  \multicolumn{1}{c}{Avg} &
  Avg &
  Avg &
  Overall &
  \multicolumn{1}{c}{M-Avg} \\ \hline

\multicolumn{9}{l}{\textit{Open-source Tool-free Video MLLMs}} \\ \hline
Qwen2.5-VL~\cite{bai2025qwen25vl}     & \multicolumn{1}{c|}{7B} &  &  &  &  &  &  &  \\
Qwen3-VL~\cite{bai2025qwen3vl}       & \multicolumn{1}{c|}{8B} &  & \multicolumn{1}{l}{} &  & \multicolumn{1}{l}{} & \multicolumn{1}{l}{} & \multicolumn{1}{l}{} &  \\
LLaVA-Video~\cite{llava_video}    & \multicolumn{1}{c|}{7B} &  &  &  &  &  &  &  \\
Video-R1~\cite{feng2025video_r1}       & \multicolumn{1}{c|}{7B} &  & \multicolumn{1}{l}{} &  & \multicolumn{1}{l}{} & \multicolumn{1}{l}{} & \multicolumn{1}{l}{} &  \\ \hline

\multicolumn{9}{l}{\textit{Open-source Decoupled Tool-using Video MLLMs}} \\ \hline
VideoChat-R1.5~\cite{yan2025videochat_r1_5} & \multicolumn{1}{c|}{7B} &  &  &  &  &  &  &  \\
LOVE-R1~\cite{fu2025love_r1}        & \multicolumn{1}{c|}{7B} &  &  &  &  &  &  &  \\
Video-RTS~\cite{video-rts}      & \multicolumn{1}{c|}{7B} &  &  &  &  &  &  &  \\ \hline

\multicolumn{9}{l}{\textit{Open-source Native Tool-using Video MLLMs}} \\ \hline
VITAL~\cite{zhang2025vital}          & \multicolumn{1}{c|}{7B} &  & \multicolumn{1}{l}{} &  & \multicolumn{1}{l}{} & \multicolumn{1}{l}{} & \multicolumn{1}{l}{} &  \\
Video-Zoomer~\cite{ding2025videozoomer}   & \multicolumn{1}{c|}{7B} &  & \multicolumn{1}{l}{} &  & \multicolumn{1}{l}{} & \multicolumn{1}{l}{} & \multicolumn{1}{l}{} &  \\
LongVT~\cite{longvt}         & \multicolumn{1}{c|}{7B} &  & \multicolumn{1}{l}{} &  & \multicolumn{1}{l}{} & \multicolumn{1}{l}{} & \multicolumn{1}{l}{} &  \\
\rowcolor[HTML]{C1FFD6}
Ours &
  \multicolumn{1}{c|}{\cellcolor[HTML]{C1FFD6}7B} &
  \cellcolor[HTML]{C1FFD6} &
  \multicolumn{1}{l}{\cellcolor[HTML]{C1FFD6}} &
  \cellcolor[HTML]{C1FFD6} &
  \multicolumn{1}{l}{\cellcolor[HTML]{C1FFD6}} &
  \multicolumn{1}{l}{\cellcolor[HTML]{C1FFD6}} &
  \multicolumn{1}{l}{\cellcolor[HTML]{C1FFD6}} &
  \cellcolor[HTML]{C1FFD6} \\ \hline
\end{tabular}
```

如果你希望把 `tabular` 的列对齐也更“规整”（比如全部用 `c`，减少 `\multicolumn{1}{l}{}` 的混用），我也可以顺手帮你整理一版。
